home.heroSubheading: The art of Italian cuisine, infused with Georgian hospitality
home.aboutText1: Since 2015, the Antico team has been bringing the finest Italian cuisine to the Georgian table. Our head chef honours tradition while never losing sight of creativity.
home.aboutText2: Every dinner is a special occasion. We create an atmosphere where families, friends and business partners gather around one table.
home.feature1Desc: Only seasonal, fresh ingredients paired with the finest Italian products.
home.feature2Desc: Every guest is special. Our team is always ready to serve you.
home.feature3Desc: Monday through Sunday, from noon to midnight.
home.feature4Desc: In the heart of Tbilisi, on Rustaveli Avenue.
home.menuText: Seasonal ingredients, handmade pasta, fresh seafood and traditional Italian desserts.
home.ctaText: Our team is ready to prepare a special evening for you. Book your table now.

menu.title: Our Menu
menu.subtitle: All dishes are prepared with fresh, seasonal ingredients. Prices are in GEL.
menu.allergen: For allergen information please ask our staff. We provide vegetarian and vegan options on request.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Our atmosphere, dishes and unforgettable moments.

reservation.title: Table Reservation

reservation.submitNote: Our team will contact you to confirm the reservation.
reservation.policyText: For groups of 10+ please contact us directly by phone.
reservation.successNote: Our team will contact you to confirm your reservation.

reservation.preOrderNote: Your food will be ready when you arrive
reservation.cartRequired: Please add at least 1 item for takeout.
